description: Style Note Tonga's summer collection features head-turning designs, fashion-forward yet classic, this piece will stay in vogue up to the next season. Tap into summer's aesthetic effortlessly while chanelling the runway's hottest trends. Style this with a tapering pair of denims (we recommend a wedge heel for the spring) for maximum effect.Product Details Grey and white stretchy top with black lace flutter sleeves, has a bow at the front, a V-neck and a bucket neck at the backMaterial and Care 72% rayon, 15% polyflax, 13% polyesterHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
